messages.text: Hey! 👋 How can I help you today? If you let me know your email and a quick note on what you’re looking to learn or build, I’ll forward it to the team so they can follow up.

✨ We have three plans. **Starter** is $149 and is self‑paced with 8 core modules, hands‑on notebooks, a community forum, and a completion certificate.  
**Professional** is $499, adds 12 advanced modules, 3 graded projects, and live weekly Q&A.  
**Team** is $1299, gives everything in Professional plus up to 10 seats, a private cohort, onboarding, and an admin progress dashboard.

If you’re an individual just getting your feet wet with AI, the **Starter $149** plan is the most cost‑effective and gives you all the essentials to start. It’ll let you build a solid foundation and move into more advanced material when you’re ready.  

Let me know which tier you’d like to go with, and I’ll walk you through the checkout!

Great! Here’s what we offer:

- **Starter** – $149: 8 core modules, hands‑on notebooks, community forum, and a certificate.  
- **Professional** – $499: All Starter stuff plus 12 advanced modules, 3 graded projects with mentor feedback, and live weekly Q&A.  
- **Team** – $1299: Everything in Professional plus up to 10 seats, a private cohort, onboarding support, and an admin progress dashboard.

Since you’re just getting into AI and looking for a solid foundation, the **Starter** tier ($149) is usually the best fit—it gives you a strong base with practical notebooks and a certificate to show off. Ready to go ahead and pick it?

Hi! 👋 What would you like to chat about—our AI Training Course, a specific module, or something else? Once I’ve got a clear idea, I’ll capture your email and a quick note of what you’re looking for so the team can follow up.

Your order for the OnePromise AI Training Course – Starter tier at $149 has been received! 🎉 We’re excited to have you on board and will start sending your course access shortly. If you need anything else, just let us know!

We have three plans: Starter for $149, Professional for $499, and Team for $1,299.

Based on your interest in practical, hands‑on learning and a solid progression, the **Professional ($499)** plan is the best fit: it gives you the full curriculum plus real projects and mentor feedback, plus live Q&A to keep you on track.

If that sounds right, let me know and I’ll help you pick it!
